Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Chanthra Aerotech Public Company Limited (fictional) (“CAPCL”); SET issuer context (fictional exchange “SET-Fic”), Thai capital markets regulator (fictional “SCT”).
Company profile for filing: Juristic Person Reg. No. 0105556789013 (invalid checksum, for template use), Tax ID 0993000123456 (invalid), registered office at 88/9 Moo 4, Soi Chanok 5, Khwaeng Si Lalin, Khet Pathumwan, Bangkok 10999 (fictional).
Disclosure status: the non-binding project finance term sheet with Coral Reef Bank (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. (fictional) was publicly summarized on the exchange news portal; no undisclosed price-sensitive terms remain.
SEA (Thailand) compliance: current information does not constitute MNPI; any forward-looking statements for the One Report are high-level and already cleared for public use via issuer portal (fictional “SETLink-F”).
Employment and secondment updates: revised executive secondment letter and PDPA consent form use form labels only (e.g., Name: _______; Position: _______; ID No.: _______) pending HR population.
Cross-border data transfers (employment/payroll): CAPCL will rely on SCCs and a transfer impact memo for PaySiam SG Pte. Ltd. (fictional); only pseudonymized datasets to be shared until the DPO signs off.
PII hygiene: draft HR files display placeholder fields and invalid examples, e.g., Thai National ID 1-2345-67890-12-3 (checksum fail, example only) and generic phone field 0X-XXX-XXXX; do not replace with live data before redaction workflow is engaged.
KYC for lender: one-off verification for authorized signatory (role only) requires a government ID; Passport No. TA1234567 will be used for the role-holder’s verification with the bank (no name recorded in this memo).
Finance documentation: draft facility agreement (Thai/English) and guarantee pack include account placeholders (Company A/C 123-4-XX000-0, sample only) and do not specify drawdown dates or amounts.
Regulatory touchpoints: SCT public helpline (fictional) 02-700-0000 and SET-Fic issuer support 02-800-1234 may be contacted for form-format queries only; substantive disclosures continue through the company secretary channel.
Internal contacts: governance@chanthraaerotech-fic.co.th (role mailbox) for PDPA queries; treasury-ops@chanthraaerotech-fic.co.th (role mailbox) for FX control/BOT filing placeholders (e.g., FCD form references only).
Section 59 reports (SEA): directors and executives (role titles only) confirm no trading during blackout; any future trades will be pre-cleared and reported through the standard portal; no waivers requested.
Employment rosters circulated to the board show masked rows (Employee Name: [redacted], Tel: [public helpline only], Email: [department mailbox]), with no personal emails or direct lines included.
Next steps: finalize anonymization checklist for One Report exhibits, confirm DPO sign-off on cross-border clauses, and re-validate that no supplemental financing terms require immediate exchange disclosure.
